title: Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Warehouse Manager looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates:
Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates!
